name: accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow forecasts cause financial mismanagement. We automate cash flow forecasting instead of manual cash flow tracking spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts lead to financial mismanagement.
features: user-friendly dashboard for cash flow overview
